mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_ehs_annual_plan t WHERE COALESCE(t.is_approved, 0) = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_annual_plan WHERE COALESCE(is_approved, 0) = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ehs_annual_plan t WHERE t.plan_year = #{planYear} AND COALESCE(t.is_approved, 0) = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_annual_plan WHERE plan_year = #{planYear} AND COALESCE(is_approved, 0) = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ehs_annual_plan (plan_year, plan_name, description, status, priority, remarks, created_by, modified_by, plan_approver, completion_approver, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{planYear}, #{planName}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{remarks}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{planApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{completionApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_annual_plan SET plan_year = #{planYear}, plan_name = #{planName}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, remarks = #{remarks}, plan_approver = #{planApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, completion_approver = #{completionApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_ehs_annual_plan t WHERE t.plan_year = #{planYear} AND t.is_approved = 1 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_ehs_annual_plan SET status = #{status}, is_approved = #{approved}, plan_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE plan_approved_at END, plan_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE plan_approved_by END, completion_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE completion_approved_at END, completion_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE completion_approved_by END,
reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
